tailored.summary: I am a Software Engineer with experience building robust backend systems, eager to apply my skills to the blockchain space. I have a strong foundation in Python, FastAPI, and cloud deployment with AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes, and I am excited to leverage this expertise to develop smart contracts and DeFi protocols on Ethereum. My goal is to contribute to innovative blockchain solutions.

bullets: Developed REST APIs using Python and FastAPI, enabling efficient data exchange.
Managed PostgreSQL databases, optimizing performance through complex SQL query writing.
Deployed and managed services on AWS utilizing Docker and Kubernetes for scalable infrastructure.
